title: Fit test - Successfully completing the Fit Test
scenario: Successfully complete the Fit Test and return to the Device Home Screen after tapping "Done".
steps: Open the app with Osprey/Tern/Emu connected and correctly positioned in the ears.
Go to Device Settings > Fit Test.
Start and successfully complete fit test.
expected: "This is a good fit!" appears on screen, both earbuds marked with icon and "Good" tag, "Done" button displayed. After tapping "Done", user returns to Device Home Screen (or Onboarding if fit test was triggered during Onboarding).
